Which purple units you have?
I'm talking of those purple
Might be good to either get gramona or tinct
Murphy can be decent but she does 0 dmg in case your dps dies
Faros can't supp well, more like semi dps
murphy is luck based if she is the last one left
Tinct can dispel enemies buffs + debuffs on allies
she can kill 1-2 solo if you have reached arithmetica cap
Not really
It's more about how much exalt she can spam
Ive had it happen a few times, and yeah
get off 2 exalts in 1 turn and have 2 damage cards can USUALLY wipe 1 char
The problem with murphy is she is too squishy
true
In deathmatch she can't shield well from exalt
if you use liz's wheel you can force it
Her dmg scale on exalt but good luck trying to get to the point of exalt spam

if you play her ailemus gen first, liz wheel will copy and put in draw pile, then play arithmetica for draw 2 (if she is last man standing you should be at arith cap), second ailemus gen for exalt, and hopefully you have 2 attack cards
like i said, luck based XD

What are various buff called in the game?
Especially hows the delayed cleanse called?
Can you precise? I'm not sure to understand
You mean this?
I mean like is empower called empower? Is bolster or fortify?
Hmmmm
purify is delay ceanse
fortify in morimens

empower, weakness, shield same
block is now barrier
bolster is now fortify

amplification is pandia's ultimate buff, +10% dmg/shield/heal
Strength is +1 damage, applied after most multipliers, but before empower

all delayed damage is now just bleed
burn is now poison
freeze is now paralysis
I prefer the varieties of delayed damage from My Turn. Thematic to characters. bombs, lightning, stars.
fatigue is sluggish/slow/stagnation
curse is now blighten
chant is now preparation
Not sure if in their previous game they have petrify
stun is now faint or petrify. weird that two differnt names for it, aigis and lily
entangle is now entwine
break is now vulnerable
rush is now ambush
What's delayed healing called?
im checking the cards, and delay is still the word, but I'm noticing all the heal cards say restore instead of heal. delayed restore. i think everybody calls it heal though
Alright ty
Made a post about hand reading
Nice, a lot of people don't know about this
What a gdoll traphase team would be like?
Most of time gdoll is support due to her high healing value, arithmetica and alimus/shield generation, but she can also help sniping
i see her on fast aggressive teams that aim to end quickly
She fits basically anywhere. People like to use her with Gramona because double teamwide ailemus gen and lots of controlled sniping
I see her with 24 a lot too
I see thanks for the informations guys. It is kinda hard to win in a row for 5 times well ig it is better to do it in another way <:24_clown:1374289675417686016>
5 in a row would be a feat
You could just go for 1 daily, the only time you need to win in a row is to get up into the higher ranks
Right there is no way about it since we are not in pokemon tcg pocket which sometimes (one day) required to win 5 times in a row to get the badge
Bad old times
5 in a row is a feat?
i go on huge loss streaks and win streaks
For someone getting into traphase, yeah
This is the way to play traphase
I love when I am just going for daily so I lose 5 in a row and have to win 6

the main thing about gdoll is her shield is extremely situational and almost always worse than aliemus gain. her 3 cost card is very weak and it is better to spend mana elsewhere, and just because you can play her 0 cost card this turn, doesn't mean that you should.
with her ult, i typically dmg for kills and otherwise heal. but sometimes an enemy is better kept alive if they're non-threatening and you want their draws to show up for enemy.
Gdoll advantage is the ability to choose what to do based on the situation
Which makes her highly adaptive to most situations
